docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BUTTERFIELD, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT BOULDIN, JANICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR BUTTERFIELD, JESSE ASSIGNED TO JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST (REMOVED AS ASSIGNEE OF RECORD ON 12/09/16)

FILED ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RE-ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST RE-ASSIGNED ALL RIGHTS BACK TO PLAINTIFF. FILED BY ASSIGNEE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST (REMOVED AS ASSIGNEE OF RECORD ON 12/09/16) AS TO DEFENDANT BOULDIN, JANICE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTTERFIELD, JESSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOULDIN, JANICE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
